query:
SELECT 
  oi.id as order_item_id,
  oi.productId,
  oi.variantId,
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.materialColorId,
  mc.colorCode,
  mc.colorName,
  mc.imageUrl as materialColor_imageUrl,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM variant_materials vm WHERE vm.variantId = pv.id) as variant_materials_count
FROM order_items oi
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON oi.variantId = pv.id
LEFT JOIN material_colors mc ON pv.materialColorId = mc.id
WHERE oi.orderId = 240001
ORDER BY oi.id
LIMIT 1;
